suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce manual UI verification evidence when a feature requires agent-browser checks (for example, require explicit interactiveChecks or documented rationale when unavailable).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `fix-multiselect-range-lasso` found UI-heavy changes completed without agent-browser usage while skill feedback was marked as followed; transcript 9bd13c77-1066-4973-83f3-b138587db5fc and handoff had no interactive checks.
